messages.welcome: Welcome to SystemA v.3.1 System Maintenance and Reporting Tool
messages.disclaimer_text:
Please Read This Text Carefully Before Running The Program.

This program, by its nature, has the potential to make changes to system files, registry, or disk configuration. To protect your system stability and data security, it is critical that you accept and implement the following:

1. Full System Backup and Disk Image Requirement
Before running the program for the first time or starting any operation, you must take a full backup of your system and a current disk image (Disk Image / Clone) to prevent possible data loss and system crashes. The only way to restore your system to its previous stable state in case of an unexpected error is this backup.

2. Disclaimer
Risk is Yours: This software is provided "As-Is". Use of the program is entirely at the user's own risk.

No Liability: The software developer cannot be held responsible for any direct or indirect material/moral damages, including operating system crashes, data loss, hardware failures, or commercial losses that may occur due to the use, malfunction, or incompatibility of the program.

No Warranty: No express or implied warranty is given that the software will work flawlessly on every system or provide uninterrupted performance.

Acceptance: By continuing to run the program, you declare that you understand the risks mentioned above, have performed the necessary backup and disk imaging operations, and irrevocably accept all responsibility that may arise.
messages.accept_disclaimer: I have read and accept the above disclaimer. Do you want to continue? (Y/N):
messages.disclaimer_rejected: You did not accept the disclaimer. Redirecting to language selection.
messages.confirm_operation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation? (Y/N):
messages.confirm_restart: ⚠️ This operation may require a system restart. Are you sure? (Y/N):

memorial: This program has been prepared in memory of our brother Ertuğrul Murat CEVİZ, whom we recently lost. May Allah have mercy on him, and may the souls of all our departed ones find peace in paradise. May their souls be blessed, El-Fatiha.
